name: Get Supported Translation Formats
description: Returns an up-to-date list of supported translations, showing which source design file types can be translated into which target formats. Optionally filters results by last modified date.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via POST /authentication/v2/token. Required for user context access.

headers.name: If-Modified-Since
headers.description: Optional HTTP-date string (e.g., 'Wed, 21 Oct 2015 07:28:00 GMT'). Only formats modified after this date are returned.

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Optional. Specifies preferred encoding for the response. Supports 'gzip'.

status_codes.200: OK - Request succeeded and returns supported formats.
status_codes.304: Not Modified - No new formats since the specified date.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid date or request format.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Authorization header.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Endpoint does not exist.

headers.name: Last-Modified
headers.description: Date and time when the supported formats list was last updated.

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service identifier with name, version, and environment.

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Service startup time in format 'EEE MMM dd HH:mm:ss Z yyyy'.

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Request duration in milliseconds.

headers.name: x-ads-troubleshooting
headers.description: Debug info about server failure, if applicable.

formats.description: Key-value pairs of supported translation formats.

name: Create Translation Job
description: Creates an asynchronous job to translate a source design into one or more derivative formats (SVF, OBJ, DWG, etc.). Use the manifest endpoint to check translation status. Supports optional region selection, force-refresh of manifest, and advanced options per format.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via POST /authentication/v2/token.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json.

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Specifies where to store the manifest and derivatives. Values: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta).

headers.name: x-ads-force
headers.description: Optional. If true, clears existing manifest/derivatives before translation.

headers.name: x-ads-derivative-format
headers.description: Optional. Specifies object ID format for OBJ translation. Values: latest (default), fallback.

input.urn: string (URL safe Base64 encoded source URN) [required]

formats.type: string (e.g. svf, svf2, obj, dwg, stl, ifc, etc.) [required]

status_codes.200: OK - Translation accepted and in progress.
status_codes.201: Created - Translation exists already and won't re-run.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Likely malformed URN or unsupported format.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Endpoint does not exist.
status_codes.406: Not Acceptable - Format not supported for this input.
status_codes.409: Conflict - Another translation job is still processing.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service name, version and environment.

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Server startup time.

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Request duration in ms.

body_structure.urn: string - same as source input URN

name: Specify References for Translation
description: Informs the Model Derivative service where to locate referenced files required for translating a design with external dependencies (e.g., Inventor assemblies). Must be called before creating a translation job with `checkReferences: true`.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> obtained from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Specifies where the referenced files are stored. Values: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta)

uri_params.urn: string - The URL safe Base64 encoded URN of the source design [required]

urn.description: URN of the top-level component. Required if the URN in the URI is a logical URN.

region.description: DEPRECATED: Region where to store reference information. Use the 'region' header instead.

filename.description: Top-level file name. Defaults to an empty string, which means the file will be downloaded using the URN.

references.urn: string - Base64 encoded URN of the reference file [required]
references.filename: string - File name of the reference file [required]

status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid URN or malformed JSON.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Endpoint does not exist.
status_codes.406: Not Acceptable - Reference files stored in a different region than the main file.

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service name, version, and environment.

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Request duration in milliseconds.

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Service startup time.

body_structure.urn: string - The URN of the top-level design component

name: Get Translation Manifest
description: Retrieves the manifest for a given design URN. The manifest includes status and metadata for all derivatives generated from the source design. Use this to monitor translation progress or review the available derivative formats.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> obtained from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Optional. Set to `gzip` or `*` to receive compressed response.

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region where the design is stored. Values: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta). Ignored for EMEA endpoint.

uri_params.urn: string - Base64 URL-safe encoded URN of the source design [required]

status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid URN or malformed request.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token.
status_codes.404: Not Found - URN does not exist.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Unexpected service issue.

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service identifier: name, version, and environment.

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Server startup timestamp (EEE MMM dd HH:mm:ss Z yyyy).

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Request processing time in milliseconds.

headers.name: x-ads-troubleshooting
headers.description: Server error diagnostics, if any.

body_structure.urn: string - URN of the source design
body_structure.status: string - Overall translation status: pending | inprogress | success | failed | timeout
body_structure.hasThumbnail: boolean - Whether the source design has a thumbnail
body_structure.region: string - Region where the files are stored (US, EMEA, AUS)

derivatives.name: string - Name of the derivative
derivatives.outputType: string - Format of derivative: svf, svf2, stl, obj, etc.
derivatives.status: string - Status of this derivative: pending | inprogress | success | failed | timeout

messages.type: string - Type of message (error, warning, info)

name: Delete Manifest and Derivatives
description: Deletes the manifest and all generated derivatives for the given design URN. The original source file remains unaffected. The operation is idempotent-repeated calls return 200 even if the manifest is already gone.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> obtained from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region where manifest is stored. Values: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta). Ignored if using EMEA URI.

uri_params.urn: string - Base64 URL-safe encoded URN of the source design [required]

status_codes.200: OK - Manifest and all derivatives successfully deleted. Also returned if no manifest existed.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid URN or malformed request.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Token missing, invalid, or lacking proper scopes.
status_codes.403: Forbidden - Valid token but insufficient permissions (check data:write scope).
status_codes.404: Not Found - The URN does not correspond to any existing manifest.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure during deletion.

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service identifier: name, version, and environment.

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Server startup timestamp (EEE MMM dd HH:mm:ss Z yyyy).

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Request processing time in milliseconds.

200.result: string - Always 'success' for a valid request

name: Get Derivative Download URL
description: Returns a secure download URL and signed cookies (valid for up to 6 hours) to access the specified derivative file. These cookies must be sent with the download request. The URL supports range headers for partial downloads.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Storage region for derivative. One of: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta). Ignored if using regional URI.

uri_params.urn: string - Base64 URL-safe encoded URN of the source design [required]
uri_params.derivativeUrn: string - URL-encoded URN of the derivative (from manifest) [required]

query_params.name: minutes-expiration
query_params.description: Optional. Lifetime of the signed cookies in minutes. Default is 360. Must be ≤ 360.

query_params.name: response-content-disposition
query_params.description: Optional. Custom Content-Disposition header for the download. Must start with `attachment`.

status_codes.200: OK - Signed URL and cookies successfully returned.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Malformed URN or invalid query params.
status_codes.403: Forbidden - Access denied even if authenticated.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Derivative or manifest not found.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Unexpected backend failure.

headers.name: Set-Cookie
headers.description: Three signed cookies required for the file download.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: application/octet-stream

headers.name: Content-Length
headers.description: Size of the derivative in bytes

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: API identifier (service, version, environment)

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Service startup timestamp

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: API response duration in ms

body_structure.etag: string - ETag (hash) of the derivative file
body_structure.size: string - Size of the derivative in bytes
body_structure.content-type: string - MIME type of the derivative
body_structure.expiration: string - Epoch timestamp (ms) when the signed cookies expire

name: Check Derivative Details
description: Returns headers with metadata about a specific derivative (e.g., size). Useful to check file size before downloading, especially for large files where you may want to use chunked downloads with range headers.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region where the derivative is stored. Values: US (default), EMEA, AUS (beta). Ignored if regional URI is used.

headers.name: Range
headers.description: Optional. Byte range for partial download (e.g., `bytes=0-1023`). Used to preflight chunked downloads.

uri_params.urn: string - Base64 URL-safe encoded source design URN [required]
uri_params.derivativeUrn: string - URL-encoded URN of the derivative file [required]

status_codes.202: Accepted - Request accepted but derivative not yet ready. Try again later.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Malformed URN or invalid Range format.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token.
status_codes.403: Forbidden - Token lacks permission or access denied.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: application/octet-stream

headers.name: Content-Length
headers.description: Size of the derivative in bytes

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Service name, version, and environment

headers.name: x-ads-startup-time
headers.description: Service startup time (EEE MMM dd HH:mm:ss Z yyyy)

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: API call duration in milliseconds

headers.name: x-ads-troubleshooting
headers.description: Error diagnostics if available

name: Download Thumbnail
description: Downloads a thumbnail of the specified source design. You can specify width and/or height for the image. The response is a binary image stream.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> from POST /authentication/v2/token

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Storage region (US | EMEA | AUS). Ignored if using regional endpoint.

uri_params.urn: string - Base64 URL-safe encoded design URN [required]

query_params.name: width
query_params.description: Optional. Thumbnail width in pixels. If only height is specified, width defaults to height.

query_params.name: height
query_params.description: Optional. Thumbnail height in pixels. If only width is specified, height defaults to width.

status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid URN or thumbnail parameters.

headers.name: x-ads-name
headers.description: Filename of the returned thumbnail

headers.name: x-ads-size
headers.description: Returned size, e.g. [200,200]

headers.name: x-ads-role
headers.description: Source of the thumbnail: rendered or extracted

headers.name: x-ads-job-status
headers.description: Status of thumbnail generation: inprogress, success, failed, or timedout

headers.name: x-ads-app-identifier
headers.description: Identifier for service version/environment

headers.name: x-ads-duration
headers.description: Processing time (e.g., 32 ms)

headers.name: x-ads-troubleshooting
headers.description: Error info, if any

response.body: Binary stream of thumbnail image (JPEG or PNG)

name: Get Model Views
description: Returns a list of Model Views (Viewables) in the source design specified by the URN. Each Model View includes a unique viewable ID used for other metadata operations. Available only for SVF or SVF2 translated designs.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via POST /authentication/v2/token.

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of accepted response encodings (e.g., gzip).

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region for data storage. Possible values: US (default), EMEA, AUS.

uri_parameters.name: urn
uri_parameters.description: The URL-safe Base64 encoded URN of the source design.

status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid URN format or malformed request.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authorization token.
status_codes.403: Forbidden - Access denied regardless of token.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Design not found or not translated to SVF/SVF2.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Unexpected service failure.

name: Get Object Tree
description: Retrieves the structured hierarchy (object tree) from the specified Model View (Viewable) of the source design. The object tree represents the relationships and arrangement of objects within the Model View.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via POST /authentication/v2/token.

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of accepted response encodings (e.g., gzip).

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region for data storage. Possible values: US (default), EMEA, AUS.

headers.name: x-ads-force
headers.description: Optional. If true, forces the system to parse property data again to retrieve an object tree.

headers.name: x-ads-derivative-format
headers.description: Specifies which Object IDs to return for legacy SVF derivatives. Values: latest (default), fallback.

uri_parameters.name: urn
uri_parameters.description: The URL-safe Base64 encoded URN of the source design.

uri_parameters.name: modelGuid
uri_parameters.description: The ID of the Model View. Obtained via the List Model Views operation.

query_parameters.name: forceget
query_parameters.description: Optional. If true, retrieves the object tree even if it exceeds 20 MB in size.

query_parameters.name: objectid
query_parameters.description: Optional. If specified, retrieves the sub-tree that has the specified object ID as its parent.

query_parameters.name: level
query_parameters.description: Optional. Specifies the child levels to return. Supports only level=1 currently.

status_codes.409: Conflict - Request conflicts with a previous one.
status_codes.413: Request Entity Too Large - Exceeds 20 MB limit.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.

name: Get Properties of Objects
description: Returns a list of properties of all objects in the specified Model View. Properties are returned as a flat list, ordered by their objectid. The objectid is a non-persistent ID assigned when the source design is translated to SVF or SVF2.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained using POST /authentication/v2/token.

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of accepted response encodings (e.g., gzip).

headers.name: region
headers.description: Optional. Region for data storage. Possible values: US (default), EMEA, AUS.

headers.name: x-ads-force
headers.description: Optional. If true, forces the system to parse property data again to retrieve properties.

headers.name: x-ads-derivative-format
headers.description: Specifies which Object IDs to return for legacy SVF derivatives. Values: latest (default), fallback.

uri_parameters.name: urn
uri_parameters.description: The URL-safe Base64 encoded URN of the source design.

uri_parameters.name: modelGuid
uri_parameters.description: The ID of the Model View. Obtained via the List Model Views operation.

query_parameters.name: objectid
query_parameters.description: Optional. If specified, retrieves the properties of the object with the given object ID.

query_parameters.name: forceget
query_parameters.description: Optional. If true, retrieves large resources even if they exceed the 20 MB limit.

status_codes.409: Conflict - Request conflicts with a previous one.
status_codes.413: Request Entity Too Large - Exceeds 20 MB limit.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.

name: Get Model Properties
description: Queries the objects in the Model View (Viewable) specified by the modelGuid URI parameter and returns the specified properties in a paginated list.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a two-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json.

headers.name: region
headers.description: Specifies the data center where the manifest and derivative of the specified source design are stored. Values: US, EMEA, AUS.

headers.name: x-ads-derivative-format
headers.description: Specifies what type of Object IDs to return. Values: latest (default), fallback.

headers.name: Accept-Encoding
headers.description: Comma-separated list of algorithms for encoding the response. Use gzip or * for compression.

uri_parameters.name: urn
uri_parameters.description: The URL-safe Base64 encoded URN of the source design.

uri_parameters.name: modelGuid
uri_parameters.description: The ID of the Model View (Viewable) that contains the objects to fetch properties for.

body_parameters.name: query
body_parameters.description: Specifies what objects to query using one of the supported query operators such as $in, $eq, $prefix, etc.

body_parameters.name: fields
body_parameters.description: Specifies what properties of the objects to return. If omitted, returns all properties.

body_parameters.name: pagination
body_parameters.description: Defines how to paginate the response with limit and offset.

body_parameters.name: payload
body_parameters.description: Specifies the format for numeric values. Values: text (default), unit.

status_codes.202: Accepted - Request accepted but processing is not complete.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid or malformed input.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Resource or parameter is invalid or missing.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Unexpected error occurred.
